title: Representative Structures from Molecular Dynamics Simulations of the Inward Facing and Outward Facing States of LaINDY
author: Trebesch, Noah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This upload is a supplementary data set for the following publication:  D. B. Sauer, N. Trebesch, J. J. Marden, N. Cocco, J. Song, A. Koide, S. Koide, E. Tajkhorshid, and D.-N. Wang. "Structural basis for the reaction cycle of DASS dicarboxylate transporters."  eLife .  9 , e61350. DOI: 10.7554/eLife.61350 . Please see the main publication for the methods, analysis, and discussion associated with this data set.
